os-setup.summary: Bootstrap vault structure with mode selection and personalized onboarding

ai-identity-blueprint.summary: Find Your Voice: a guided interview that captures how you communicate and writes it into Context/me.md so your assistant sounds like you.

agentic-os-obsidian.summary: Set up an agentic OS inside an Obsidian vault — command-center dashboard + 5 auto-installed plugins, Home/per-profile/Vault Overview pages, button bar wired to Claude prompts
